sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Nice has shown decent form in their last 5 matches with 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, including a strong 3-1 victory against PSG. Stade Brestois has had mixed results with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses, but they’ve struggled defensively, conceding multiple goals in recent away games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head encounters, Nice has dominated with a 1-0 win and a 0-0 draw, maintaining a clean sheet in both matches. These games have typically been low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in all recent meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Nice ranks higher in the league (4th) with a solid attack (60 goals scored) and defense (41 conceded), compared to Brestois (8th, 52 scored, 53 conceded). Nice also has an edge in big chances created and defensive stability, while Brestois often struggles away from home.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Nice’s attacking players like Evann Guessand (11 goals) and Gaëtan Laborde (9 goals) are in form, and their defense is bolstered by goalkeeper Marcin Bułka. Brestois relies on Ludovic Ajorque (13 goals), but their missing players and defensive vulnerabilities could hinder them.
